plans.name: safe_natural
plans.summary: Correct white balance and skin, keep sky mostly realistic.
plans.gpt_image_prompt:
This is a photo retouching task, NOT image generation. Strictly preserve: person identity, facial features, face shape, skin texture, pores, expression, age, hair, body shape, pose, clothing design and brand colors, logos, text and signs, background structure, object shapes, composition, and framing. Do not add, remove, move, or replace any object. Do not beautify or slim faces/bodies.
Correct the overall white balance to neutral, removing color casts, without changing subject identity or object colors.

plans.name: commercial_clean
plans.summary: Brighter, cleaner, more pleasing delivery color.
plans.gpt_image_prompt:
This is a photo retouching task, NOT image generation. Strictly preserve: person identity, facial features, face shape, skin texture, pores, expression, age, hair, body shape, pose, clothing design and brand colors, logos, text and signs, background structure, object shapes, composition, and framing. Do not add, remove, move, or replace any object. Do not beautify or slim faces/bodies.
Correct the overall white balance to neutral, removing color casts, without changing subject identity or object colors. Gently lift overall exposure to open up midtones while protecting highlights. Add gentle global contrast for a cleaner look without crushing shadows.

plans.name: restore_original_intent
plans.summary: Preserve stage/sunset/night mood, only fix pollution.
plans.gpt_image_prompt: This is a photo retouching task, NOT image generation. Strictly preserve: person identity, facial features, face shape, skin texture, pores, expression, age, hair, body shape, pose, clothing design and brand colors, logos, text and signs, background structure, object shapes, composition, and framing. Do not add, remove, move, or replace any object. Do not beautify or slim faces/bodies.
